pages.text: This chapter is dedicated to describing custom mob effects in $(bold)$(#ff0fb7)TerraFirma$()$()$(bold)$(#595959)Greg$()$().$(li)$(bold)$(9)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#cooling)Cooling$()$(li)$(bold)$(9)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#warming)Warming$()$(li)$(bold)$(9)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#quenched)Quenched$()$(li)$(bold)$(9)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#cure_parasites)Cure Parasites$()$(li)$(bold)$(9)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#cure_toxins)Detoxify$()$(li)$(bold)$(9)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#cure_microplastics)Filter Microplastics$()$(li)$(bold)$(c)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#freezing)Freezing$()$(li)$(bold)$(c)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#blazing)Blazing$()$(li)$(bold)$(c)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#instant_radiation)Instant Radiation$()$(li)$(bold)$(c)$(l:tfg_tips/mob_effects_glossary#final_moments)Final Moments$()
$(bold)$(9)Cooling$()$(li)While active this effect continually $(l:beneath/cooling)Cools$() the player down to a minimum of $(n)5Â°C$()
$(bold)$(9)Warming$()$(li)While active this effect continually $(l:beneath/cooling)Warms$() the player up to a maximum of $(n)25Â°C$()

$(bold)$(9)Quenched$()$(li)While active this effect prevents the natural decay of $(l:cooking/food_and_water#thirst)Thirst$(). However, it does not prevent the Thirsty effect from decreasing your meter.$()
$(bold)$(9)Cure Parasites$()$(li)While active this effect gradually removes $(l:cooking/food_and_water#parasites)Parasite Contamination$() at a rate of about 1% every 10s at base level.$()
$(bold)$(9)Detoxify$()$(li)While active this effect gradually removes $(l:cooking/food_and_water#toxins)Toxin Contamination$() at a rate of about 1% every 10s at base level.$()

$(bold)$(9)Filter Microplastics$()$(li)While active this effect gradually removes $(l:cooking/food_and_water#microplastics)Microplastic Contamination$() at a rate of about 1% every 10s at base level.$()

$(bold)$(c)Freezing$()$(li)While active this effect continually $(l:beneath/cooling)Cools$() the player down to a dangerously-low minimum of $(n)-20Â°C$(). Protective equipment is recommended to survive this condition.

$(bold)$(c)Blazing$()$(li)While active this effect continually $(l:beneath/cooling)Warms$() the player up to a dangerously-high maximum of $(n)60Â°C$(). Protective equipment is recommended to survive this condition.
$(bold)$(c)Instant Radiation$()$(li)This effect quickly damages the player with $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Radioactive_materials)Radiation Damage$()
$(bold)$(c)Final Moments$()$(li)This effect starts a timer that counts down your last few minutes. When the clock ends you die.
